headline: A Look At American International Group’s Valuation After Recent Share Price Gains
summary: Event context and recent share performance American International Group (AIG) shares closed at $78.68 on Friday, with recent returns of about 0.6% over the past day, 2.4% over the past week, and 5.9% over the past month. See our latest analysis for American International Group. That recent 1 month share price return of 5.9% comes after a weaker year to date share price return of a 6.6% decline, while the 3 year total shareholder return of 63.1% points to longer term momentum still in...
